args:
set -e

find_bifrost_launcher() {
  if [ -n "${BIFROST_AGENT_SKILL_DIR:-}" ]; then
    candidate="${BIFROST_AGENT_SKILL_DIR}/bin/bifrost-launcher.mjs"
    if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then
      printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
      return 0
    fi
  fi

  dir="$PWD"
  while :; do
    candidate="$dir/.agents/skills/bifrost-code-intelligence/bin/bifrost-launcher.mjs"
    if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then
      printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
      return 0
    fi
    if [ "$dir" = "/" ]; then
      break
    fi
    dir="$(dirname "$dir")"
  done

  if [ -n "${HOME:-}" ]; then
    for base in "$HOME/.config/agents/skills" "$HOME/.agents/skills" "$HOME/.config/amp/skills"; do
      candidate="$base/bifrost-code-intelligence/bin/bifrost-launcher.mjs"
      if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then
        printf '%s\n' "$candidate"
        return 0
      fi
    done
  fi

  printf '%s\n' "Could not find bifrost-code-intelligence/bin/bifrost-launcher.mjs. Reinstall the Bifrost Amp skill bundle or set BIFROST_AGENT_SKILL_DIR." >&2
  return 127
}

launcher="$(find_bifrost_launcher)"
exec "$launcher" "$@"
